title: Made in Abyss OST
description: This resource pack replaces MOST of the music in the game with Kevin Penkin's amazing Made in Abyss soundtrack. It also replaces the textures and item names of the record discs to fit with their new songs.
body:
This resource pack replaces MOST of the music in the game with Kevin Penkin's amazing Made in Abyss soundtrack. It also replaces the textures and item names of the record discs to fit with their new songs.

To my knowledge at the moment the only music not replaced is the creative mode songs.

You'll have to find out yourself which songs play where, but i've done my best to make them fit where they play as I didn't want their placement to be random and unfitting. The music disc choices were limited as using music longer than their original track will cut them off, so I chose songs which are the right length.
_____________________________________________________________
Here is a list the music disk songs and the inspiration for their art.

5 - Pathway - Mitty

11 - Those Everyday Feels - Map of the Abyss

13 - Narhate and the Machine - Made in Abyss 2 OST art

blocks - Gravity - Faputa

Cat - Drums of Ganja-tai - Made in Abyss 3 OST art

Chirp - Reg and his Interference unit - Reg's helmet

Far - I. AM. BURNING. MAN. - Entrance to Iruburu


Mall - Underground River - Made in Abyss 1 OST art

Mellohi - Finale - Device used to decend into Layer 6

Otherside - Hanezeve Caradhina - The Abyss from above

Pigstep - Ryuusazai - Ryuusazai

Relic - Katachi - Katachi's art

Stal - The Forth Layer - Field of Eternal Fortunes

Strad - Riko's theme - Riko's helmet and red whistle

Wait - The Golden City - Iruburu's haku sign

Ward - The Rumble of Scientific Triumph - Bondrewd
